About Surya Dental Care

Your trusted partner in comprehensive, compassionate, and modern dental care.

Our Patient-First Philosophy

At Surya Dental Care, our foundation is built on genuine care, professionalism, and a deep-seated commitment to our patients' well-being. We understand that a visit to the dentist can be daunting for many. That's why we've cultivated a calm, welcoming atmosphere where your comfort and confidence are our top priorities.

From the moment you walk in, our attentive team is dedicated to making your experience smooth and anxiety-free. We believe in transparent communication, taking the time to thoroughly explain every step of your treatment plan and ensuring you feel heard, respected, and empowered in your dental health journey.

Meet Our Expert Team

Our highly skilled and compassionate professionals are the heart of Surya Dental Care. They are dedicated to providing exceptional care and building lasting relationships with our patients.

Dr. P. Senthil Kumar, MDS

Lead Dentist & Implantologist

Praised for his meticulous approach and patient-centric care, Dr. Senthil ensures every treatment is performed with the utmost precision and compassion.

Dr. Nehla

General & Cosmetic Dentist

Known for her courteous and friendly demeanor, Dr. Nehla excels at making patients feel comfortable and at ease, especially those with dental anxiety.

Our Caring Staff

Hygienists & Assistants

p>

Our entire support team, from hygienists to reception, is committed to providing attentive, punctual, and friendly service to ensure your visit is seamless.

A Modern & Serene Environment

Explore our state-of-the-art clinic, designed for your comfort and safety.

Impeccably Clean

We adhere to the highest standards of hygiene and sterilization for your safety and peace of mind.

Voices of Our Patients

We are honored by the trust our patients place in us. Here's what they have to say.

My recent treatments were highly satisfactory, and I now feel confident and comfortable continuing my dental care with this clinic. Thank you to the entire team for the excellent service.

- Ravi Vasudevan

I have LOTS of anxiety about going to the dentist. After this visit... They made me feel comfortable and I believe the treatment plan is actionable and has my best interest in mind. Great dental experience!

- Usha S

I was very tense about the treatment before coming, but each time I visited, they took excellent care of me. They treat every patient with so much attention and kindness. Successfully had my dental implants done here.

- Mahalakshmi

Schedule Your Visit Today

Ready to experience a new standard of dental care? Fill out the form below to request an appointment and our team will get in touch with you shortly.

Professional, calm, and welcoming dental care for your entire family.
